name: Soar
detail: Using only your Web Wings, glide from the Financial District to Astoria (Wind Tunnels are okay!)

name: Evolved
detail: Defeat 100 enemies with Evolved Venom abilities

name: Overdrive
detail: As Miles, use Reverse Flux to pull 6 or more enemies together simultaneously

name: Just Let Go
detail: As Miles, find the science trophy Miles and Phin won together

name: Fully Loaded
detail: Purchase all of Spider-Man's Suit Tech upgrades

name: Resourceful
detail: Collect a total of 10,000 Tech Parts

name: Home Run!
detail: Round the bases at the Big Apple Ballers Stadium

name: Funky Wireless Protocols
detail: Solve the mystery of the Spider-Bots' origin

name: Hang Ten
detail: Perform 30 Air Tricks in a row without touching the ground

name: Armed and Dangerous
detail: Defeat 100 enemies with Spider Arm abilities

name: Surge
detail: Use Symbiote Abilities 25 times during Symbiote Surge

name: Slack Line
detail: Stealth takedown 25 enemies in stealth from the Web Line

name: You Know What to Do
detail: As Peter, visit Aunt May's grave

name: Splat
detail: Attempt and fail a trick before "landing" on the ground

name: Antidote
detail: Defeat a Symbiote that is under the effect of Anti-Venom status

name: First Encounter
detail: Have your first conversation with Hades.

name: Stoked
detail: Make all spirits reach an ecstatic mood at least once

name: Big Spender
detail: Buy at least 100 items from Raccoon Inc.

name: The More, The Merrier
detail: Make five spirits reach an ecstatic mood at least once.

name: More Than 15%
detail: Give Furogawa Tour's guide a tip.

name: Sheep Cleaner
detail: Shear the sheep at least 50 times.

name: Decked Out
detail: Build all houses and stations at least once on the boat.

name: Loose Lips
detail: Tell Astrid about Giovanni's night excursions

name: Fully Improved: Buck
detail: Fully improve Buck's Lair of Wonders.

name: Second Encounter
detail: Have your second conversation with Hades.

name: At Least Someone is Happy
detail: Make one spirit reach an ecstatic mood at least once.

name: Spiritfared
detail: Bring all releasable spirits to the Everdoor.

name: Sealed Lips
detail: Do not tell Astrid about Giovanni's night excursions.

name: Third Encounter
detail: Have your final conversation with Hades.

name: Fully Improved: Bruce & Mickey
detail: Fully improve Bruce and Mickey's Crib.
